title: NexusCarry
description: A mod that adds equipment for carrying items - the Satchel and the Backpack
body:
## NexusCarry
!!IMPORTANT!!
This mod requiries Trinkets. No official Trinkets builds are published on Modrinth for Minecraft versions newer than 1.21.1. We recommend either using [Trinkets-canary](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets-canary), downloading a compatible Trinkets version on [our maven repository](https://maven.riftrealms.de/releases/dev/emi/trinkets/3.11.0/trinkets-3.11.0.jar) or building it from the [updated source code.](https://github.com/Patbox/trinkets/tree/update/1.21.6)

Yes, another backpack mod

This mod add two items: The satchel and the backpack. Both are functionally identical and differ only in visual style.
Bags can be open through a button in the survival inventory

### Dyeing
Both the bag and the straps can be dyed, on both of the bags.
- The easiest way to dye the bags is with [Dip Dye](https://modrinth.com/mod/dip-dye). Holding the item in your offhand dyes the straps instead of the base bag
- Bags can also be dyed on crafting tables, with the dyes in the right column applying to the straps

Examples of dyed bags:

![A satchel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sBjB0yij/images/2128aa0dedac6e37c3d045dacecf7f4da4d10781.png)![A dyed backpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sBjB0yij/images/df45e28dc082c9a28ca07d84fcc563b7b43a3a8c.png)
